name: dabd-writing-tools
description: Writing tools for software engineers: one prose editor (structure, concision, surface), an opt-in laconic register, and a deterministic Stop-hook prose gate.

plugins.name: prose
plugins.description: One-pass editor for work prose. Structure and concision via the Williams & Bizup method, surface de-slop adapted from Hardik Pandya's stop-slop, an opt-in Klinkenborg-inspired laconic register, and a Stop hook that lints final replies for mechanical style violations. Replaces the clarity-and-grace, laconic, and stop-slop plugins.
